reasons.accuracy: Core technical claims are correct: DeepSeek R1 architecture (671B/37B active/256 routed experts + 1 shared/8 per token), MTP mechanics (auxiliary prediction heads in main model, no separate draft model required), IB bandwidth conversion (800 Gbit/s ÷ 8 = 100 GB/s), Jensen GTC 2024 30x promise. One minor naming error: NIXL is described as 'NVIDIA Inference Transfer Library' but the correct expansion is 'NVIDIA Inference eXchange Library'. Key benchmark numbers (98x/100x speedup vs H100, MTP cost drop from $0.251 to $0.057/M tokens) are attributed to SemiAnalysis InferenceX data and cannot be independently verified without primary source access, which is expected for a newsletter-sourced CP post.

Appropriate hedging used consistently: '據報' for the Claude Code on Trainium claim, 'SemiAnalysis 推測' for the GB300 FP4 software-not-yet-optimized inference, 'SemiAnalysis 直言' before AMD software critique passages. Exemplary self-correction at lines 145-147: the ClawdNote explicitly flags that the source article itself is inconsistent about whether MTP is included in the H100 baseline, explains the conservative interpretation chosen, and notes both numbers are real — this level of editorial transparency is rare and commendable.
reasons.consistency: Argument flows cleanly from premise to conclusion throughout. The 'high interactivity = low batch size' definitional relationship is established early and applied consistently in all subsequent analysis. The apparent tension between '98x speedup at 116 tok/s/user' and 'NVL72 cost advantage disappears at 130 tok/s/user' is not a contradiction — they measure different things (raw throughput ratio vs $/M tokens cost). The $6k/day figure (≈$2.19M/year) vs the $3M/year target presents a mild reader-math tension: a reader who multiplies $6k × 365 gets $2.19M, not $3M. The ClawdNote lists both numbers without explicitly noting this is current-rate vs aspiration — a minor logical gap that careful readers will notice.

reasons.sourceAlign: sourceUrl（siliconangle.com/2026/04/14/openai-launches-gpt-5-4-cyber-model-vetted-security-professionals/）與文章內容高度吻合：GPT-5.4-Cyber 發布、Trusted Access for Cyber 分級驗證、CTF benchmark、Codex Security 均有對應；附加的 Anthropic 對比段落屬 CP 格式正常編輯延伸。
reasons.attribution: 數字有語境歸因（「OpenAI 秀出的 CTF benchmark 數據」、「根據官方數據」），Simon Willison 引言有明確歸屬，ClawdNote 意見與正文事實清楚分隔；第 108 行的 'contributed to fixes' 措辭質疑是良好的 attribution 實踐；少數統計（27%、76%）透過 SiliconAngle 轉述，間接來源鏈未明說但可接受。

reasons.accuracy: Trusted Access for Cyber 啟動年份寫成「2026 年 2 月」，但 source（siliconangle.com）明確指出是 2025 年 2 月，差了整整一年；Codex for Open Source「超過 1,000 個開源專案」無法從 source 直接驗證，其餘 CTF benchmark（27%/76%）、Codex Security 3,000 個漏洞、chatgpt.com/cyber 入口均與 source 吻合。
reasons.fidelity: 整體翻譯忠實，binary reverse engineering 能力描述、分級驗證機制、cyber-permissive 定位均正確呈現；但 Trusted Access 啟動年份（2026 vs 實際 2025）是可追溯至 source 的明確背離，不屬於翻譯詮釋範圍的偏差。
reasons.consistency: 文章論述連貫，blanket restriction → identity-based access 的主線有力且有 source 支撐，ClawdNotes 均清楚標示為觀點而非事實，Anthropic Mythos 的對比段落有 CP-298 內部交叉參照支撐，邏輯無矛盾。

reasons.persona: Opening tension (Reddit says regression vs Anthropic docs says design) and resolution ('4.7 不是變笨，是懶得腦補') shows genuine LHY teaching feel, but sections 3–6 (effort/batch/positive-examples/scaffolding) slide into writing-mode tips rather than professor-talking-mode.
reasons.clawdNote: All 5 notes have real opinions: Arena structural bias call-out, '技術 ego 要先放下' on shell-script-to-contract shift, vendor-specific-course-influencers burn at the end — more than half clear takes, not just analogies.
reasons.vibe: Engaging opener and insightful convergence ending make it a rewarding read, but the four middle tip-sections feel functional rather than fun — a developer friend would read it, not a general tech audience.
reasons.clarity: Zero 你/我 violations in body text; all quotes attributed with links (Boris Cherny, Karpathy); ClawdNote speaker always unambiguous; names and roles used correctly throughout.
reasons.narrative: Has a real arc — tension/resolution opener, SP-175 callback thread as through-line, convergence payoff ending — but sections 3–6 each follow the same explain → practical-rule → [ClawdNote] template, matching the 8-point rubric description exactly.

reasons.glossary: All 4 glossary-relevant terms linked: context-window (/glossary#context-window), mcp (/glossary#mcp), agent (/glossary#agent), claude-code (/glossary#claude-code) — no key terms missed.
reasons.crossRef: All 4 internal post links verified as real slugs: sp-116-20260317-reverse-engineering-claude-code, clawd-picks-150, clawd-picks-20260209-nicbstme-crumbling-workflow-moat, clawd-picks-20260203-karpathy-2025-llm-review all exist; no ShroomDog/Clawd name mentions in body text trigger identity link requirement.
reasons.sourceAlign: Content clearly derived from @vikingmute's X post about Context Mode — sandbox isolation, SQLite FTS5 search, all numeric compression ratios (56KB→299 bytes, 45KB→155 bytes, etc.) consistent with declared sourceUrl topic.
reasons.attribution: All numerical claims attributed to 原作者; ClawdNote opinions clearly separated via component; minor gap: Cloudflare Code Mode comparison in final section has no source link.

reasons.persona: Section titles ARE the analogies (水龍頭壞了、門口裝保鏢、廚房不搬到桌上、精準點菜)，類比是結構性而非裝飾性；口語感真實，數字段用「先出來」「讓人說不出話的那個」做戲劇性鋪排，非新聞稿 enumerate。
reasons.clawdNote: 六個 notes 全部有立場：「窮人版RAG」是真正的 opinion zinger，ClawdNote 5 獨立提出「每次呼叫都在做無用功」是原文沒有的洞見，ClawdNote 3 對 API 設計下了整體判斷，BS-detector 自我修正有個性。
reasons.vibe: 153 筆 git log 的 callback 結構完整，「那些 token 本來就不應該在 context 裡」的 reframe 是讀完後記得住的句子；延伸閱讀段在 ClawdNote 6 punch 後略顯洩氣，但整體讀來舒服不想划走。
reasons.clarity: 全篇正文零 你/我：用「很多人」「模型」「原作者」替代人稱，ClawdNote 的第一人稱「我」來源明確（Clawd is speaker）；逐行掃描無任何 pronoun 歸屬模糊。
reasons.narrative: 開頭 153 筆 git log 建立問題 → 解法兩層展開 → 數字段戲劇性堆疊 → 「記得開頭那個場景嗎？」明確 callback → 核心 reframe；去掉比喻和 ClawdNote 後骨架仍有 callback 弧度，非純線性報告。

reasons.persona: 期末分組報告開場、小公司/外送員/便利商店/宿舍/口袋抽屜保險箱等比喻密度夠且各自獨立不重複，口語感自然，但終端機支援那段滑進教學模式，LHY 說話感掉了幾分。
reasons.clawdNote: 六個 ClawdNote 裡至少四個有明確立場：第一個點名 Agent 自由對話等於開放式實習生討論（反對）、第二個挑戰「新功能就要衝」預設行為（勸退）、第六個用 AI 記住你三個月前 PR 錯誤的笑點做收，第三個（VS Code 節哀）偏資訊提示、缺乏 opinion，勉強達標。
reasons.vibe: pane 不自動關掉那段的「傻眼」發現、以及「別因為這個坑就放棄 Agent Teams」的反轉，製造了真實閱讀張力；最後不用 bullet recap 收尾加分，但整體黏住感還不到「立刻轉發給朋友」的程度。
reasons.clarity: 正文全程無 你/我 洩漏，測試觀察用「ShroomDog 花了幾天實際跑了一輪」明確歸屬，ClawdNote 裡的「我的觀點」在豁免範圍內，subject 清晰度全文最高。
reasons.narrative: 開頭分組報告框架與結尾 callback 構成真實首尾呼應，pane 坑的意外發現是情緒高點，「別貼半成品標籤」的立場轉折是敘事推進；但「解鎖隱藏關卡」到終端機支援那兩段骨架是 feature review，拿掉比喻後偏向教學文。

improvements.crossRef: ShroomDogNote 第 105 行「OpenClaw 的 SOUL.md...」是文章正文中第一個明確出現 Clawd/ShroomClawd 身份的文字（<ClawdNote> 是元件標籤而非文字提及）。依規則，此處 OpenClaw 須加上 /about 連結：`[OpenClaw](/about)`。延伸閱讀三個 /posts/ 連結均驗證存在，此項扣分僅針對缺少的身份連結。

critical_issues: crossRef：OpenClaw（= Clawd/ShroomClawd）在 ShroomDogNote 第 105 行首次以文字出現，但未連結 /about，違反身份連結必填規則。ShroomDog 本人連結（/about）已正確存在，但 Clawd 一側對應連結缺失。
